Spring Data JPA
  1. org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot

Packages that use org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot
Ahead-of-Time (AOT) generation for Spring Data JPA repositories.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.config
Classes for JPA namespace configuration.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot used by org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot
    Class
    Description
    AotEntityManagerFactoryCreator
    Wrapper for EntityManagerFactory.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot used by org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.config
    Class
    Description
    JpaRepositoryContributor
    JPA-specific RepositoryContributor contributing an AOT repository fragment using the EntityManager directly to run queries.
